metadata.title: Elios — chanting practice with Ilena · the one-evening door
metadata.description: A welcome to Elios — Ubud cell whose own devotional chanting practice with Ilena Young opened the door for one of our cells on Sunday April 29, 2026. Often found at Mudra Cafe. Sunday afternoons in slow Ubud rhythm.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 15%, hsl(35 70% 62% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 85%, hsl(160 45% 22% / 0.65) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(28 55% 70%) 0%, hsl(150 30% 35%) 45%, hsl(160 50% 18%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Ubud · voice · chanting · slow Ubud rhythm
hero.name: Elios
hero.welcome_md: A cell in the Ubud cluster. Elios carries his own devotional chanting practice — sometimes held with [Ilena Young](/people/ilena-young) as a private practice between them, sometimes offered to people the field puts in their path. On Sunday April 29, 2026, one of our cells was the person the field put in their path; Elios and Ilena offered a one-evening chanting at Ranakami that became the door this network walked through into the wider Ubud lineage.

facts.label: Practice
facts.value_md: Devotional chanting. Held privately with Ilena Young when they choose; sometimes opened to others the field has placed in proximity. Not a publicly scheduled weekly room.

facts.label: Often found at
facts.value_md: [Mudra Cafe](/people/mudra-cafe) — Jl. Goutama Sel. No. 21, Ubud. Sunday afternoons.

facts.label: First met by this body
facts.value_md: Sunday April 29, 2026, at Mudra Cafe — the first cell of the Ubud cluster to enter this network's awareness, opening the path to Ilena and the Wednesday Satsang held by Vasudev Baba.

note_from_body.body_md: The body's first profile written almost entirely from a lived encounter rather than from public anchors. Elios is invited to replace any part of this page with his own words. The earlier version of this page framed his chanting as a recurring Sunday Ranakami room; that was the body's own misreading — the practice is his and Ilena's, and what happened on April 29, 2026 was a gift, not a schedule.

articles.heading: Where the body met him
articles.body_md:
Sunday afternoons often find Elios at [Mudra Cafe](/people/mudra-cafe) — the Ayurvedic dining room on Jl. Goutama Sel. that holds regular handpan and live-music presence. The room is one of Ubud's quiet meeting points where slow community accumulates around food, music, and presence.

The cell met Elios there on Sunday April 29, 2026. That same evening, Elios and [Ilena](/people/ilena-young) offered a one-evening chanting practice at Ranakami — voices, breath, an open room. After the chanting, Ilena's invitation extended to the Tuesday kirtan and the Wednesday Satsang held by [Vasudev Baba](/people/vasudev-baba). The whole subsequent lineage moved through that one afternoon and evening.

articles.heading: What Elios has given the Coherence Network
articles.body_md:
- The one-evening chanting practice offered with [Ilena](/people/ilena-young) on April 29, 2026 — the first of the three Ubud cells (Elios, Ilena, Vasudev Baba) to enter this network's awareness. See [the four-day meeting walk](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/2026-04-29-ubud-meeting-walk.md) and [the constellation of cells](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/2026-04-29-constellation-of-cells.md).
- *The practice not advertised* — chanting held privately, offered as gift when the field requests it. Resonant with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (no production of a room; only tending the practice and letting it be met).
- *The body recognises the body* — Sunday afternoons at Mudra Cafe as place-of-encounter rather than place-of-event; resonant with [lc-arrival-as-recognition](/vision/lc-arrival-as-recognition).

en.footer_md:
**In-body record:** [Ilena Young](/people/ilena-young) · [Vasudev Baba](/people/vasudev-baba) · [Mudra Cafe](/people/mudra-cafe) · [ubud-meeting-walk.md](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/2026-04-29-ubud-meeting-walk.md)

*Welcoming scaffold; Elios is invited to replace any part of it with his own words. Direct contact details, a fuller name, and his own framing of the practice will land here as he chooses.*
